exploration_notes: The fix adds HTML escaping of widget attribute values in Widget.build_attrs(). Previously, build_attrs simply merged dictionaries with no escaping, relying entirely on template auto-escaping. The fix uses conditional_escape(str(value)) for non-None, non-boolean values, which: (1) converts values to strings, (2) escapes &, <, >, quotes, and (3) avoids double-escaping already-safe strings via conditional_escape. Boolean and None values are preserved as-is since they have special template handling.
